name: Honey Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp cornstarch mixed with 1 tbsp sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Spray the bottom and sides of an 8x3-inch springform pan with nonstick cooking spray.
3. Sprinkle the bottom evenly with graham cracker crumbs.
4. Beat the cream cheese in a large bowl on medium speed until smooth.
5. Beat in honey just until blended, scraping down the sides of the bowl once or twice with a rubber spatula.
6. With the mixer on low speed, sprinkle in the cornstarch mixture, then add eggs and vanilla, beating until blended.
7. Slowly pour the batter into the center of the prepared pan, taking care not to disturb the crumbs.
8. Bake for 45-50 minutes until the edges of the cake are lightly browned but the center still jiggles.
9. Remove from oven and let cool on a wire rack (the cake will set completely as it cools).
10. Cover loosely and refrigerate at least 6 hours or up to 3 days.
11. Up to 1 hour before serving, run a knife around the edge of the cake and carefully remove the pan sides.
12. To garnish, brush the top of the cake with melted apricot jam.
13. Arrange strawberries on the cake and brush with jam.
14. Pile blueberries in the middle.
